name: Lincoln's Birthday Meat Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the ground beef, bread crumbs, onion, margarine, and salt and pepper.
2. Beat the egg until bubbly.
3. Add 2/3 cups milk to the meat mixture and mix gently but thoroughly.
4. Shape into a 9x12-inch rectangle on wax paper.
5. Using the paper to lift the meat, roll it into a 9-inch cylinder.
6. Place on a shallow pan and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
7. Prepare instant mashed potatoes with butter, onions, and salt.
8. Beat the egg yolks.
9. Add milk to the potatoes.
10. Take the meat loaf out of the oven and frost with mashed potatoes.
11. Return to the oven for 10 more minutes.
12. Place cheese on top and put under the broiler until cheese melts.
13. Serves 6-8.
